name: AD Mixtape · First & Last: Japanese Private Press, Vol. 11
description: Welcome to the eleventh installment of First & Last, a series of mixes providing a glimpse into the world of Japanese private press, or 自主盤, pronounced “jishuban”, which loosely translates to “independent board.”

tracks.raw: Sasaki & Nishigaido with Momonga – 悲しみの夜汽車 (1974)⁣

おすしや (Osushiya) – 日曜の朝 (1977)⁣
川島弘之 (Hiroyuki Kawashima) – 冷たい風 (1976)⁣
